# ExerciseOutputWidget { #script_widget.widget.ExerciseOutputWidget }

```python
script_widget.widget.ExerciseOutputWidget(result)
```

Everything a ``%%exercise`` cell produced, rendered in a shaded box.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**result**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[script_widget](`script_widget`).[executor](`script_widget.executor`).[ExerciseResult](`script_widget.executor.ExerciseResult`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The outcome of ``run_exercise``. All traits below are copied from it once at construction time and never change afterward.

## Attributes {.doc-section .doc-section-attributes}

<code>[**stdout, stderr**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Captured output streams.

<code>[**outputs**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [list of dict]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Captured rich display MIME bundles (see ``ExerciseResult.outputs``).

<code>[**success**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[bool](`bool`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Whether the cell ran without raising.

<code>[**error**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Short exception summary, or ``""`` if none.

<code>[**traceback**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Full formatted traceback, or ``""`` if none.
